subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the blessed Lote-Tree, I have perused thy letter, which moved the eyes to tears as I gazed upon it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره المبارکه قد تلوت کتابک الذی بکت العیون حین اطلاعی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
